name: Kahlua Fantasy Chocolate Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups semisweet chocolate chips (Nestle is best)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare the crust by combining crushed Oreos and melted butter. Press firmly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a small saucepan, melt chocolate chips over medium heat with Kahlua and remaining butter. Stir until smooth. Set aside.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine eggs and sugar. Add sour cream and blend well.
5. Add cream cheese to the egg/sour cream mixture; beat until smooth.
6. Gradually blend in the chocolate/Kahlua mixture.
7. Pour into the prepared crust.
8. Bake for 40 minutes or until the filling is barely set in the center.
9. Turn off the oven and let stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
10. Then refrigerate for several hours or overnight.
